title: Valgrind warning if PK has more columns than the table.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b VARCHAR(255), PRIMARY KEY(a, b)) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE TABLE t2(c INT, d FLOAT, PRIMARY KEY(c, d)) ENGINE=InnoDB;
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE a IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Primary key with more columns than the table
